title: spiraea × rosalba
intro: Spiraea × rosalba, also known as Bridewort, is a hybrid flowering plant derived from the combination of Spiraea betulifolia and Spiraea salicifolia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spiraea × rosalba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be dried or made into salves for topical application.
